products.name: DXL4 Cable Avoidance Tool
products.tagline: Digital dual-frequency locator for buried utilities
products.description: Identifies electricity cables, metallic pipes, telecoms, and fibre optics before you dig. Features passive power, passive radio, active CPS, and active genny modes.

products.name: CXL4 Cable Locator
products.description: Compact, lightweight locator for everyday underground utility detection. Passive power and radio modes with depth estimation.

products.name: DXL4 + DBG Signal Generator Kit
products.tagline: Complete buried utility locating kit with signal generator
products.description: The DXL4 paired with DBG signal generator for active tracing of non-energised cables, pipes, and conductive structures.

products.name: Pipe Inspection Camera 200
products.tagline: HD push-rod camera for drain and sewer surveys
products.description: Push-rod camera system for inspecting drain pipes, sewers, conduits, and ducts from 50 mm to 300 mm diameter.

products.name: Water Leak Detector Pro
products.tagline: Acoustic leak detection for pressurised water mains
products.description: Ground microphone and correlator system for accurate detection of leaks in buried water mains. Reduces water loss and excavation costs.

products.name: Hydraulic Cable Drum Stand
products.tagline: Hydraulic drum stand for easy cable laying
products.description: Adjustable hydraulic cable drum stand for drums up to 3 tonnes. Works with cable rollers and guide pulleys for efficient installation.

products.name: OTDR Fibre Tester
products.tagline: Optical Time Domain Reflectometer for fibre optic testing
products.description: Compact OTDR for fault location, characterisation, and end-to-end fibre optic cable testing. Suitable for telecom and data networks.

products.name: Sewer Jetting Nozzle Set
products.tagline: High-pressure jetting nozzles for sewer cleaning
products.description: Set of 6 interchangeable high-pressure jetting nozzles for drain and sewer cleaning. Compatible with all standard jetting hose sizes.
